_comment: Silverstone (2011+ Arena layout, 18 corners), traced from a reference circuit map into normalised coordinates in [0,1] (x right, y down). Ordered as the racing line: start/finish -> T1(Abbey) -> Village/Loop/Aintree -> Wellington straight -> Brooklands/Luffield -> National straight -> Maggotts/Becketts -> Hangar straight -> Stowe -> Vale/Club -> start. Point 0 is the start/finish line. Approximate but clearly Silverstone-shaped; not survey-grade GPS.
name: Silverstone
